name: json-resume
description: Professional resume built with JSON Resume using the Elegant theme
author: Romain KOENIG <romain@kromatic.fr>

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && resume export dist/index.html --resume resume.json --theme elegant
scripts.build:pdf: mkdir -p dist && resume export dist/resume.pdf --resume resume.json --theme elegant
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:pdf
